data.body: Blocking-review remediation completed without production-code edits. The isolated feature worktree was fast-forwarded to current origin/main 0f5dbc88b before remeasurement. Ruff 0.15.19 now reports 53 C901 diagnostics (not the prior 52) and a maximum score of 45; the exact command is: ruff check --select C901 --config 'lint.mccabe.max-complexity=15' --exit-zero --statistics src/rebar. Observed output: "53 C901 complex-structure" and "Found 53 errors." The plan now specifies the complete JSON object schema, normalized path::AST-qualified-symbol key grammar, integer ceiling constraints, duplicate/unknown/malformed rejection, and mutually exclusive active/new/increased/stale counters with exact exit behavior. check-ac, clarity-check 5/5, and quality-check all pass. Because the plan and base SHA changed, a fresh signed review is required; prior remediation eligibility is not reused.
